allow: PowerShell($h = Get-Content 'D:\\1MT\\portfolio-abdelkerim\\blog\\arabic-rag.html' -Raw; $start = $h.IndexOf\('<article class="article">'\); $end = $h.IndexOf\('</article>'\); $body = $h.Substring\($start, $end - $start\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($body, '<[^>]+>', ' '\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($text, '\\s+', ' '\); $words = \($text.Trim\(\) -split ' ' | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\S' }\).Count; Write-Output \('Article body words: ' + $words\))
